---
pagetitle: "Teaching | Jubayer Hossain"
excerpt: "A list of selected courses of me"
toc: true
page-layout: full
---

## Upcoming Workshops 



# Courses Taught
As a Lead Organizer and Instructor at CHIRAL, Dhaka, Bangladesh, I have had the privilege of designing and delivering specialized courses in several key areas, including health research, health data science, bioinformatics, and artificial intelligence (AI). 

# Research Methodology and Communication

| **Course Title** | **Syllabus** | **Learning Outcomes** | **Target Audience** |
|--------------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| Ethics in Research                         | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1FFVJ6LHVrOKuf3_RwWsainCMb79a4RA0BrRk0BXAVl4/edit?usp=sharing) | Understand ethical principles, guidelines, and regulations in research | Graduate students, researchers |
| Fundamentals of Health Research            | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TSrwS7tk_OSfAVnpNp9y406IUSc1XRpoAWteAI7QJPQ/edit?usp=sharing) | Gain foundational knowledge in health research design, methods, and analysis | Public health students, early-career researchers |
| Mastering Biomedical Data Management       | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1y435AFSICgb1CyILNOF8oJtdnNlDGutYMI2AdrB2DUs/edit?usp=sharing) | Learn data management strategies, from collection to archiving in biomedical research | Biomedical researchers, data managers |
| Public Health Writing and Communication Skills | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1DW3a9MWiwWWQapry1Z9CwYJV8SxWgVN3Ik1CjMRVo9o/edit?usp=sharing) | Develop effective writing and communication skills for public health research | Public health students, health communication professionals |


# Advanced R & Data Analytics for Biomedical Research
| **Course Title** | **Syllabus** | **Learning Outcomes** | **Target Audience** |
|--------------------------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| R for Research                                        | [Syllabus](https://chiraltraining.github.io/RforResearch/) | Master R for statistical analysis and data visualization in biomedical research | Graduate students, bioinformaticians |
| Clinical Reporting using R                            | [Syllabus](https://chiraltraining.github.io/ClinicalReportingwithR/) | Learn clinical data reporting techniques using R, including statistical analysis and reporting formats | Healthcare professionals, clinical researchers |
| Building Dashboard with R                             | [Syllabus](https://chiraltraining.github.io/BuildingDashboardwithR/) | Gain expertise in developing interactive dashboards with R for biomedical data visualization | Data scientists, biomedical researchers |
| Research Data Analysis with SPSS                      | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18ggqa2uzAqNifCtgs5_q-DWGfl4HiBQtHSi_xp-YCPU/edit?usp=sharing) | Master SPSS for analyzing biomedical research data, focusing on advanced statistical methods | Graduate students, public health researchers |



# Biomedical Data Science & AI Applications in Health
| **Course Title** | **Syllabus** | **Learning Outcomes** | **Target Audience** |
|--------------------------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| Ethics and Governance of Artificial Intelligence for Health | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14RrAx7CEdLzX4qiZGMrWq8Go4s8hC9K-doEQ94EnNUQ/edit?usp=sharing) | Understand the ethical and governance frameworks for AI in healthcare, including privacy, security, and accountability | Graduate students, AI researchers, healthcare professionals |
| Foundations of Health Data Science                      | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cTfj2-WQCysFZhlDZjAC6Fdlu230m3YamdlkUG2O5Pw/edit?usp=sharing) | Learn the fundamentals of health data science, including data collection, preprocessing, and basic analytics | Public health students, aspiring data scientists |
| AI for Public Health                                   | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1djeHlP5mGIAX8ejtq-txRMRd4zw9XvTjvr-pXFoCJS8/edit?usp=sharing) | Apply AI techniques to public health challenges, including disease modeling, surveillance, and policy analysis | Public health researchers, AI practitioners |
| AI for Climate Change                                  | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17ZLCUsOaZ-QmVX5o4nnM5_v66SCxHI6EQmd1SD3tJxQ/edit?usp=sharing) | Learn to use AI models to analyze and predict the impacts of climate change on public health | Environmental scientists, public health professionals |
| AI for Disaster Management and Public Health Emergency | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1r0yfgMhtJiSPeBBPG3WVCCjSLhqlDF9WaVfyAG0L2hk/edit?usp=sharing) | Use AI to support disaster management, emergency response, and public health resilience during crises | Public health professionals, disaster management experts |
| Applied Machine Learning for Healthcare                | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TysxfuaLRKwiEb_oMnTwprPa-v2wH-dGPJGhT_-Fk2o/edit?usp=sharing) | Gain hands-on experience applying machine learning techniques to healthcare datasets for disease prediction, diagnosis, and treatment optimization | Healthcare data scientists, researchers, machine learning enthusiasts |


# Bioinformatics & Machine Learning in Healthcare
| **Course Title** | **Syllabus** | **Learning Outcomes** | **Target Audience** |
|------------------------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------|---------------------|
| Bioinformatics BootCamp                              | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rPrnxYFS4LobvvhM7QDzhTjOLyg5fxtIZkg4LDKM4d4/edit?usp=sharing) | Learn basic bioinformatics tools, data processing techniques | Graduate students, researchers new to bioinformatics |
| Cancer Bioinformatics                                | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1RgOXuXoEtrtvTnjsGs_A0pTLX4BbFAJXPT2V6sflGLw/edit?usp=sharing) | Understand cancer genomics, variant calling, and analysis workflows | Graduate students in cancer research |
| R for Bioinformatics                                 | [Syllabus](https://chiraltraining.github.io/RforBioinformatics/) | Gain proficiency in using R for bioinformatics tasks, such as sequence analysis | Bioinformatics researchers, R beginners |
| R for Cancer Bioinformatics                          | [Syllabus](https://bigbiolab.github.io/TCGADataAnalysiswithR/) | Apply R tools for cancer bioinformatics, focusing on mutation analysis and pathways | Cancer researchers, R users |
| Machine Learning for Bioinformatics                  | [Syllabus](#) | Implement machine learning algorithms for omics data analysis | Data scientists, bioinformaticians |
| Bulk RNA-Seq Analysis with R                         | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/16gVaZGDeoGKixYR1Oa-Zqu03c2cIMAyru9Kx8ThqYLc/edit?usp=sharing) | Analyze bulk RNA-Seq data using R, including differential expression and visualization | Graduate students in genomics, bioinformaticians |
| Single Cell RNA-Seq Analysis with Python             | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/19MdBC6pwi5P6M4yAjtq02VKN2NgnqLD-5gzut5XVths/edit?usp=sharing) | Analyze single-cell RNA-Seq data using Python, focusing on clustering and trajectory analysis | Researchers working with single-cell data |
| AI for Bioinformatics                                | [Syllabus](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1C56Se3WX5UFKbgR9GN0tIt6BwpVC6p1RCicjDmshPzk/edit?usp=sharing) | Apply AI techniques (e.g., deep learning) to bioinformatics problems | Advanced researchers, AI practitioners in life sciences |


# YouTube Contents 

## Machine Learning for Bioinformatics

::: {layout-ncol=2}
{{< video https://youtu.be/GHhojes3r1I?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/SB3iAEuea1g?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/HIXa9n1eWIM?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/0x6peaQWCME?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/hKoYa2lr5hI?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/RtCbHy6E5Ww?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/6wdDKmWgLBg?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Cx2I8IDdVNI?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/uF16MEcOygU?feature=shared >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Vjk4YE3d1WM?feature=shared >}}

:::


## Cancer Bioinformatics 
::: {layout-ncol=2}
{{< video https://youtu.be/D6jEeuxZDGU?si=1gL22eVp2oRgAlsL >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/tdrE9vBv5_M?si=RQttOuETqT-Nk5UY >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Kwf_zJ_N_Mo?si=bjLbPCKlAgSOS730 >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/xaql1cXTn0A?si=auyf0Wal1ysf_OYL >}}

:::


## R for Research 

::: {layout-ncol=2}
{{< video https://youtu.be/WiboyIkAFqo?si=MXq8fSH2Ykf93Ome >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Zb_bgEcW9gk?si=CET9jGx2SdgTfAK8 >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/lLNEfn3eLY8?si=_H_Vwu-uJ6FOFtfw >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/g9BhM5LuXcE?si=JqzA0HBsekbnMxpt >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/PDPmsgo82hE?si=osYZpX1woOMhA5eJ >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/DBESvQjhslw?si=6Ve9LW-jX-s1otvn >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Lu7utop2QJA?si=vqTbArNVbD0WRMsb >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/JcaGBHQGAWs?si=v-pqFI_bxi3RUAjF >}}

:::


## RNA-Seq Analysis with R

::: {layout-ncol=2}
{{< video https://youtu.be/tRNGUINrpls?si=saV2_DuMnLuS14RS >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/hiDo9JCkdH8?si=4u9t-JF_jUi5K--T >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/WgH-6gDGoyc?si=pWA-3jRcQQFiJarr >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Eps9BtmYRBs?si=b7VM9KGxrQvqlk3M >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/bdWws0gntMI?si=kEL_SDsSlq44PrjL >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/QuobIs-VI4E?si=oGmoCrntn7cTyuoE >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/8tQ0vnXnAIc?si=7Q_DJIOg33SoIWnB >}}


:::
